.file-embed.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fdf6e3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fdf6e3, color-mix(in srgb, #fdf6e3 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #fdf6e3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#fdf6e3, color-mix(in srgb, #fdf6e3 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(184, 30, 25, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(237, 96, 2, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(5, 144, 61, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(237, 96, 2, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(40, 40, 40, 0.08) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(253, 246, 227) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
